generated_oml:

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler

    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for structuring sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, FrictionCompensationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data structuring and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for real-time visualization of robot data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCompensationService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Commands permanent magnet synchronous motor and gearboxes (gearwheel and cycloidal) to adjust torque and angular velocity for motion control"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot data in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models with data traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight, DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance FrictionCompensationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection leading to control parameter updates for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data origins for understanding physical system behavior"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on friction loss detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot performance metrics"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SINUMERIK840DController, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SINUMERIK840DControllerEnabler, SysML_BDD_Model, SysML_IBD_Model, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AAS_DataStructuringModel, MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData, MotorCurrentData, MotorVelocityData, SecondaryVelocityData, MotorAccelerationData, SecondaryAccelerationData, RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService, FrictionCompensationService, FrictionLossDetectionInsight, DataTraceabilityInsight, ControlParameterUpdateAction, VisualizationInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32] reference."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streamed via MQTT; no specific time rate specified beyond real-time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot sensors, MQTT communication, Simulink-based processing components, AAS for metadata, and dashboard visualization integrating all data traces and models for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated; real-time monitoring and analysis of the physical system during operational phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs measured data; white-box analytical models and black-box data-driven models used for accuracy improvement, with traceability of data generation processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for Industry 4.0 standards compliance and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
